originalTitle: Reinforcement learning research with Joseph Suarez
title: Testing Optimizer Fixes and Integrating Boxabon Environment for Puffer 5
summary: Verified optimizer changes and ran confirmation experiments on breakout and protein. Integrated Tim's Boxabon environment with state-sets API, set up sweeps on Boxabon and 2048, and reviewed NetHack and other PRs. Debugged state-set performance on sparse exploration tasks, noting inconsistent gains.
